macro_segments.title: Introduction to Ibur Hashana and the Status of Chaverim in Calendar-Making

micro_segments.title: The role of Chaverim in Kiddush Hachodesh and the unity of Israel during the festivals
The meaning of 'Chaverim Kol Yisrael V'nomar Amen' in the context of calendar announcement

macro_segments.title: The Three Criteria for Intercalating the Year: Aviv, Peirot Ha'ilan, and Tkufa

micro_segments.title: The three reasons for intercalation and the requirement of two factors
The happiness of the people when Aviv is one of the factors
Rabban Shimon ben Gamliel on the status of Tkufa as a standalone reason

macro_segments.title: Geographic Criteria: The Three Lands and the Primacy of Yehuda

micro_segments.title: Three lands and two lands: geographic requirements for intercalation
Why Yehuda brings joy: the Omer comes only from Yehuda
Intercalation only in Yehuda and the significance of religious authority
Chananya Ish Ono's testimony on failed intercalation in the Galil

macro_segments.title: The Centrality of Eretz Yisrael and Bavel in Religious Authority: Historical Geonic Debates

micro_segments.title: Rabbi Yehuda ben Rabbi Shimon ben Pazi on the requirement of Eretz Yisrael for intercalation
The verse 'Lechono Tidreshu' and God's seeking of the land as justification for Eretz Yisrael's primacy
Tosafot on the exceptions: Rabbi Akiva in Nehardea and the principle 'Lo Hiniach Kamoso'
The historical shift of religious authority from Eretz Yisrael to Bavel in the Geonic period

macro_segments.title: Temporal Restrictions on Intercalation: Daytime Only and Proximity to Rosh Hashanah

micro_segments.title: Intercalation and Kiddush Hachodesh must occur during daytime
Rabbi Abba's proof from the verse Tiku Bachodesh Shofar for daytime intercalation

macro_segments.title: Restrictions Due to Famine and Agricultural Concerns

micro_segments.title: No intercalation during times of famine to ensure early grain availability
The story of Elisha and the barley bread during famine: agricultural ripening and the Omer

macro_segments.title: Temporal Restrictions on Intercalation: Daytime Only and Proximity to Rosh Hashanah (continued)

micro_segments.title: Intercalation cannot occur before Rosh Hashanah (mid-year)
Only Adar may be intercalated; the Tosafot explanation based on the fixed numbering of months

macro_segments.title: Political Constraints and Hidden Communication: The Cryptic Message to Rava

micro_segments.title: The coded message about two scholars from Tiberias carrying techeleth, seized by the Roman eagle
The scholars' desire to establish an extra month (Natziv) and Rome's prevention
The Talmidei Chachamim gathering in Av to decide on intercalation without public announcement
Natziv as a term for month based on Solomon's appointed officers; the singular Natziv of the Ibur month

macro_segments.title: Restrictions Regarding Shemita and Constraints on Consecutive Years

micro_segments.title: No intercalation from one year to the next; Rabbi Akiva's three consecutive years of calculation
No intercalation during Shemita year or the year immediately after Shemita
Preferred timing: intercalation before Shemita; Beit Raban Gamliel's exception after Shemita
Debate on vegetable imports from outside Eretz Yisrael as basis for allowing post-Shemita intercalation

macro_segments.title: Intercalation Due to Tumah (Impurity): The Case of Chizkiyahu

micro_segments.title: Debate: whether Tumah is sufficient reason to intercalate the year
Rabbi Yehuda's teaching: Chizkiyahu intercalated because of Tumah but sought forgiveness
Conceptual debate: is Tumah Hutra (permitted) or Dechuya (overridden) in a Tzibur?
The Gemara's emendation: Rabbi Yehuda says Tumah alone is not a valid reason even retroactively
Tosafot's principle: fixed-time sacrifices override Shabbat and Tumah regardless of Tzibur status

macro_segments.title: Resolution of Chizkiyahu's Sin: The Timing Error on the 30th of Adar

micro_segments.title: Chizkiyahu did not add Nissan but added a second Adar on day 30 of Adar
Shmuel's ruling: cannot intercalate on day 30 of Adar, as it could be Rosh Chodesh Nissan
Debate between Tannaim on the reason for Chizkiyahu's sin and the consequences
